entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable fitness tracker whose workout observations are being deduplicated in this code

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database used to store workout observations, queried via Python sqlite3 module

entities.name: workout_observations
entities.context: Database table storing workout data with fields: id, external_id, workout_id, source

entities.name: DuplicateGroup
entities.context: Data structure (likely a named tuple or dataclass) that collects groups of duplicate observations sharing the same external_id

entities.name: Deduplication Pipeline
entities.context: Process that identifies duplicate Fitbit observations by external_id, marks duplicates for deletion, and cleans up orphaned workouts

relationships.context: Fitbit is the source of observations stored in the workout_observations table (filtered by source = 'fitbit')
Pipeline queries SQLite to load observations, group by external_id, and identify duplicates
Pipeline builds DuplicateGroup instances from observations sharing the same external_id
Observations with matching external_ids are grouped into DuplicateGroups for dedup processing
